title: The civil war between al -Mu'tazz and al -Musta'in
description: In Rabi' II, 251 (May 2-30, 865), two hundred cavalry and infantry were reportedly sent by al-Mu'tazz to the district of Bandanijayn15 under the command of a Turk called Ablaj. They made for al-Hasan b. `Ali and looted his residence while attacking his village. Follow-

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 35
